channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffito, 14th March
item.description:
43 Culmore Road. Remove graffiti from wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Culmore Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose and Rocky paving slab, 14th March
item.description:
Outside no 43 Colmore Road and at entrance to Brimmington Patel. Loose and rocky paving slab

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Culmore Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Outside the church, 14th March
item.description:
This is broken and the council should replace it or repair it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgate Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement is overcrowded outside the fox pub, 14th March
item.description:
Pavement is overcrowded outside the fox pub, the staff are allowing customers to drink across the road from the pub outside of the licensed area. People cannot pass safely on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Middleton Road, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray painted picture of male genitalia, 14th March
item.description:
I watched this boy graffiti the brickwork today at 3.30pm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Vale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 E-bikes obstructing the footpath, 14th March
item.description:
Hazard to partially-sighted, disabled and vulnerable people

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cable Street, Wapping, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded pavement, 14th March
item.description:
Walking up Kingsland Rd by the Fox pub I was forced to either walk on the road or elbow my way through the crowds. The footpath was impassable. Some space should be left for passersby. The pub should be forced to regulate this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded pavement, 14th March
item.description:
Walking up Kingsland Rd by the Fox pub I was forced to either walk on the road or elbow my way through the crowds. The footpath was impassable. Some space should be left for passersby. The pub should be forced to regulate this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation, 14th March

item.title: Overgrown vegetation, 14th March

item.title: Dog poo, 14th March
item.description:
This person alowed its hog to shit on the grass and didn’t pick it up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34-44, Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Bin needs emptying, 14th March
item.description:
Pls empty ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heath Rise, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Yellow No Stopping Sign missing, 14th March
item.description:
Outside number 230, yellow No Stopping sign (circled in photo) is missing and needs replacing please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Antisocial parking taking two spots, 14th March
item.description:
I passed the street five minutes earlier and saw the two open spots thinking “hopefully one of them is still available when I’m back and need a parking spot”. Coming back five minutes later someone had parked a small car across both spots. It’s a shame and just so antisocial. Should be treated like any other parking violation. Google told me to report it on this website

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Caedmon Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 14th March
item.description:
There is broken glass spread over the road and pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Borland Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
